_meta.description: Example filled prompts demonstrating the image-prompt-template.json format.

examples.name: Developer at Standing Desk — Golden Hour

subject.description: Software developer working at a standing desk
subject.details: Mid-30s, dark hoodie, focused expression, hands on mechanical keyboard, dual monitors showing code editor

angle.description: Looking past the developer's shoulder toward the glowing monitors

focus.focal_point: The code on the primary monitor

background.setting: Modern home office with floor-to-ceiling windows
background.atmosphere: warm ambient glow from sunset filtering through glass

style.color_palette: Deep navy blues contrasted with warm amber and gold tones

examples.negative_prompt: cluttered desk, harsh fluorescent lighting, cartoon, low quality

examples.name: Futuristic Product Launch — Hero Shot

subject.description: A sleek, minimalist smart device floating in mid-air
subject.details: Matte black finish, curved edges, softly glowing edge display, subtle reflection on underside

angle.description: Slightly below center looking up at the device, creating a sense of power and scale

focus.focal_point: The device itself — every edge and surface detail

background.atmosphere: Dark, with controlled gradient from deep black to dark indigo

style.color_palette: Obsidian black, electric indigo highlights, white accent lighting

examples.negative_prompt: busy background, warm tones, lens flare, noise, artifacts

examples.name: Street Photography — Rainy City Night

subject.description: A lone pedestrian walking under a neon-lit awning
subject.details: Gender-neutral silhouette, holding a translucent umbrella, carrying a bag, reflected by wet pavement

angle.description: Street-level framing, shot from across the intersection

elements: neon signs in Japanese and English
background.atmosphere: Heavy rain, mist, neon glow bleeding into the wet street

style.color_palette: Vivid magenta, teal, and amber neon against deep charcoal rain

examples.negative_prompt: daytime, sunny, crowded scene, flat lighting, over-saturated
